creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to gnikl from comment #3)
> I have no idea which DRI version is used

$ LIBGL_DEBUG=verbose glxinfo 2>&1 | fgrep DRI

> or how to default/force DRI3.

- "modesetting" uses DRI3 by default since ports 121ae90af147
- xf86-video-intel requires Option "DRI" "3" in xorg.conf
